PRO · Rehabilitation

La Villette

Location Paris
Year 2025–2026
Studio Studio BELEM
Type Residential Rehabilitation
Surface 940 m²

A five-storey residential building in the 19th arrondissement, brought back from a state of partial disuse through a careful reading of its Haussmannian structure and the traces left by successive occupants. The work involved full structural consolidation, redistribution of floor plates, and a renovation of the facade in accordance with ABF prescriptions governing the protected perimeter around the Buttes-Chaumont.

The project was carried out within the French building permit framework from preliminary studies through to PC submission, with full BIM coordination between architectural, structural, and MEP consultants. The interior organisation was redesigned to meet contemporary standards of use while preserving the spatial character of the original construction: generous ceiling heights, stone thresholds, and the continuity of load-bearing walls were treated as fixed conditions rather than constraints.
